title: Plugin texture overlay compositing (layer sorting + 2D layer compositing on gun texture)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1311-1335 (Plugin texture overlay: texture_overlay field, layer sorting, 2D compositing flow, transparent areas)
C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1344 (Plugin overlay works in both first-person and third-person views)
acceptance_criteria: PluginOverlayCompositor: collects all installed plugins with texture_overlay declaration from GunSyncS2CPacket synced data
Layer sorting: plugins sorted by layer value low-to-high; same layer sorted by install order (first-installed first)
2D compositing: base gun texture (or shoot_texture if firing) as bottom layer, plugin textures composited on top in sorted order
Plugin textures must match gun texture dimensions; transparent areas in overlay show lower layer through
Plugins without texture_overlay declaration do not participate in compositing (their data-layer effects still work normally)
Final composite texture fed to vanilla item rendering pipeline for 3D processing
Overlay compositing works in both first-person and third-person views
Compositing is client-side only (uses synced plugin list from GunSyncS2CPacket)
